Off Calendar Apr-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., of the Law Offices of Elizabeth MacDonald, Tel. 415.922.5939 specially appearing for the plaintiff and moving party.

No other appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Request For Attorney Fees is Granted with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
